backend/ingredient-store.mo: Motoko module defining ingredient data types (SkinType, IngredientSafety, IngredientInfo) and a Map-based store with functions to add, retrieve, and list all ingredients.
backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the skincare platform backend with user profiles, skin type questionnaires, product recommendations, ingredient analysis, favorites, routines, product notes, and role-based access control using MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report documenting implemented features with evidence including redesigned visual identity, enhanced color palette, upgraded card components, and improved button design with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing detailed summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities including routing, authentication, questionnaire flow, product recommendations, and styling configurations.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining OKLCH color palette for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with html2pdf.js CDN script included for PDF export functionality and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, questionnaire, results, dashboard, favorites, routines, comparison, resources, journal, ingredients, product checker, DBMS docs) and ProfileSetupModal for new users.
Component displaying user's skin analysis history as cards with detected skin type, timestamp, and concern badges (acne, pigmentation, aging, dryness) with color-coded severity levels and icons.
frontend/src/components/ArticleCard.tsx: Displays an educational article as a clickable card with category badge, title, and preview text; opens a full-content dialog modal on click.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Protects routes by checking Internet Identity authentication status; shows loading spinner during initialization and login prompt for unauthenticated users.
Renders a grid of product cards with ingredient compatibility indicators and a summary table showing which ingredients are compatible across products.
frontend/src/components/ConnectivityCode: Displays tabbed code examples demonstrating actor initialization, authentication, query/mutation hooks, error handling, and loading states with copy-to-clipboard functionality.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/DataFlo: Visualizes the application's data flow from UI components through React Query, Actor layer, Motoko backend, to stable storage. Includes detailed explanations of authentication flow using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/ERDiagr: Displays entity-relationship diagram showing database schema with entities (User, Product, Ingredient, Routine, etc.) and their relationships. Includes descriptions of entities and key relationship cardinalities.
Displays a legend card explaining ER diagram notation symbols (entity rectangles, attribute ovals, relationship diamonds, and cardinality) with visual examples and emerald/teal styling.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/SchemaD: Renders a database schema diagram image and displays detailed table definitions for users, skin_type_results, products, ingredients, product_ingredients, favorites, routines, and routine_steps using SchemaTable components.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/SchemaT: Displays a single database table schema with columns, types, and constraints, showing icons for primary/foreign keys and special styling for junction tables.
frontend/src/components/ExportButton.tsx: Fetches user profile, analysis history, routines, favorites, and notes, then generates and opens a printable HTML export in a new window.
frontend/src/components/IngredientAnalys: Provides a textarea for comma-separated ingredient input, validates and parses entries, calls the analyze mutation, and displays safety classifications with color-coded badges and scores.
frontend/src/components/IngredientCard.t: Displays an ingredient summary card with safety classification badge and concern tags; opens a detail modal on click.
frontend/src/components/IngredientDetail: Modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a skincare ingredient, including safety classification, description, suitable skin types, and specific concerns (acne, sensitivity, clogging).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header navigation, app branding, and conditional menu items (Resources, Dashboard, Favorites, Journal, Ingredients, Product Checker) based on authentication status.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
Button component that uses html2pdf.js library to export content to PDF with configurable options for margins, quality, and page breaks.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying skincare product details with favorite toggle, optional comparison checkbox, price range badge, and concern icons; includes modal trigger for product notes.
frontend/src/components/ProductNoteModal: Modal dialog for adding or editing product notes with star rating (1-5), notes text area, and usage experience field.
frontend/src/components/ProductRecommend: Displays personalized skincare product recommendations grouped by category (cleanser, serum, moisturizer, etc.), with selection functionality to compare up to 3 products and navigation to a comparison page.
frontend/src/components/ProductSearchBar: A search input component with autocomplete dropdown that fetches product suggestions as the user types, supports keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape), and triggers a callback when a product is selected.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name on first visit, preventing dismissal until the profile is saved via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
Displays progress metrics for skin concerns (acne, pigmentation, aging, dryness) with trend indicators (improvement/decline/stable) and provides insights on skin health changes over time.
frontend/src/components/Questionnaire.ts: A multi-step questionnaire component that collects user responses about skin characteristics, calculates skin type and concern levels using scoring logic, and saves the results before navigating to the dashboard.
frontend/src/components/ReminderCard.tsx: Shows a dismissible reminder card prompting users to retake the questionnaire if their last analysis was over 3 months ago, and displays seasonal skincare tips with local storage-based dismissal tracking.
frontend/src/components/ResultsDisplay.t: Displays user's skin type analysis results including skin type classification, concerns with severity levels, and product recommendations. Handles loading states and redirects to questionnaire if no results exist.
frontend/src/components/RoutineList.tsx: Renders a list of user's skincare routines with steps ordered by sequence and frequency. Provides delete functionality and empty state with prompt to create first routine.
Displays tabbed SQL query examples (CREATE, INSERT, SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE, JOINs) with copy-to-clipboard functionality. Provides educational reference for database operations with descriptions for each query type.
frontend/src/components/TrendChart.tsx: Renders a simple progress bar visualization for skin concern trends with color-coded severity levels (improvement, decline, stable). Uses dynamic styling based on current concern level and trend direction.
frontend/src/components/UIScreenshotGall: Displays a gallery of UI screenshots with descriptions, key features, design elements, and annotations for each page. Documents the healthcare-inspired emerald green design theme and accessibility features.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance with React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with admin tokens.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend actor, handling loading states and actor availability.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality, managing AuthClient lifecycle and identity state with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Comprehensive collection of React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, skin type detection, product recommendations, ingredient analysis, progress metrics, routines, favorites, and product notes.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a professional healthcare-inspired color palette using emerald/teal tones for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ComparisonPage.tsx: Displays a side-by-side comparison of 2-3 selected products using ComparisonTable component. Fetches comparison data via useCompareProducts hook and handles loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: User dashboard showing analysis history, routines, progress tracking, and reminders. Displays statistics cards for analyses and favorites with navigation to related pages and export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/DBMSDocumentationPage: Renders comprehensive DBMS project documentation including ER diagrams, schema diagrams, SQL queries, UI screenshots, data flow diagrams, and connectivity code. Provides PDF export functionality via PDFExportButton.
frontend/src/pages/FavoritesPage.tsx: Displays user's favorited products by filtering product recommendations against saved favorites. Shows empty state when no favorites exist with heart icon prompts.
frontend/src/pages/IngredientAnalysisPag: Simple wrapper page that renders the IngredientAnalysis component within an AuthGuard.
frontend/src/pages/IngredientDictionaryP: Searchable ingredient database page displaying all ingredients as cards. Includes search filtering by ingredient name and empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with hero section, product search bar, feature cards, and CTAs to start questionnaire or analyze ingredients. Showcases key app features like skin type detection, ingredient analysis, and personalized recommendations.
frontend/src/pages/ProductJournalPage.ts: Displays a user's product journal with notes and ratings for skincare products. Shows loading state, empty state, and renders cards with star ratings and user experiences.
frontend/src/pages/ProductSuitabilityChe: Provides a product suitability checker with autocomplete suggestions, keyboard navigation, and ingredient safety analysis. Displays suitability results with color-coded badges and detailed ingredient breakdowns.
frontend/src/pages/QuestionnairePage.tsx: Simple wrapper page that renders the Questionnaire component within an AuthGuard for authenticated access.
frontend/src/pages/ResourcesPage.tsx: Educational resources page with searchable articles organized by tabs (skin types, concerns, ingredients, routines). Includes search functionality and filtered content display.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Simple wrapper page that renders the ResultsDisplay component within an AuthGuard for authenticated access.
frontend/src/pages/RoutineBuilderPage.ts: Interactive routine builder allowing users to create skincare routines by adding, reordering, and configuring product steps with frequency settings. Integrates with recommendations and favorites.
frontend/src/pages/RoutinesPage.tsx: Lists all user skincare routines with loading state and a button to create new routines. Displays routines using the RoutineList component.
Documentation file containing code examples for actor initialization, Internet Identity authentication flow, and React Query hooks for data fetching from the backend canister.
frontend/src/utils/educationalContent.ts: Defines educational articles about skin types, concerns, ingredients, and routines, pulling content from skinTypeDescriptions and providing structured information for each skin type and common skincare topics.
frontend/src/utils/exportFormatter.ts: Generates HTML export reports for user skincare data including profile, analysis history, products, routines, favorites, and notes with print-friendly styling and formatting.
frontend/src/utils/questionnaireData.ts: Contains an array of 10 questionnaire questions with descriptions and multiple-choice options for determining skin type, concerns, and skincare needs.
frontend/src/utils/seasonalTips.ts: Provides season-specific skincare tips (winter, spring, summer, fall) and a function to retrieve the appropriate tip based on the current date.
Defines comprehensive descriptions for each skin type (oily, dry, combination, sensitive, normal) including taglines, characteristics, care tips, and recommended ingredients.
frontend/src/utils/sqlExamples.ts: Contains SQL schema examples for creating database tables (users, products, ingredients, routines, etc.) and sample INSERT statements for populating the skincare application database.
frontend/src/utils/uiScreenshots.ts: Exports metadata describing UI pages (Landing, Questionnaire, Results, Dashboard, Favorites, Routines, Routine Builder, Product Journal) with their key features, design elements, and annotations for documentation or screenshot generation purposes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including typography, container settings, OKLCH color system with semantic tokens (primary, secondary, destructive, success, warning, muted, accent), custom font sizes with line heights, and imported plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a cosmetic/skincare analysis platform with features including skin type detection questionnaire, ingredient safety classification, product suitability checker with autocomplete search, and personalized recommendations based on skin compatibility scoring.
